ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Ajooni Biotech Limited's board approved a preferential issue of 9 million equity shares to its promoter, Healthy Biosciences Limited, at Rs. 4.30 per share, raising Rs. 3.87 crores, alongside an increase in its authorized share capital. This action will significantly boost the promoter's holding from 26.89% to 30.53%, diluting existing public shareholding and potentially raising governance concerns regarding minority investor interests.
